items.title: Ten years after Brexit, the City of London financial district is stronger than ever
items.summary: When the United Kingdom left the European Union following the referendum on June 23, 2016, the City of London financial district had to relinquish some of its activities that were focused on the European market. But it has since bounced back, recording strong growth in insurance and fintech.
